emails.subject: FW: Access Agreements
emails.body: Sheila: Please send your usual message on this one. I assume it is for ECT Investments Inc. Thanks. Sara

emails.subject: RE: Access Agreements
emails.body: RE: Access Agreements Sara, This would be ENA. I want to talk to Shane because it says "JP Morgan online FX system" but the agreement is with Chase. With Chase, we would only be requesting Online trading functionality for an existing counterparty relationship. Sheila

emails.subject: FW: Access Agreements
emails.body: Okay... I admit it.. I was really out to lunch on this one.... especially since I owned Chase stock personally and now have JPM instead.... sg
